source_of_truth: Central identity provider selection for humans and machine identities. This file documents provider shape only.

microsoft_entra_id.purpose: Recommended for Azure and Microsoft 365 organizations with managed identities, service principals, conditional access, and audit logs.

okta.purpose: Central SSO and lifecycle management for organizations standardized on Okta.

google_cloud_iam_workspace.purpose: Central identity for Google Workspace or Google Cloud projects using service accounts and workload identity federation.

aws_iam_identity_center.purpose: Central identity for AWS organizations using permission sets, roles, and short-lived sessions.

local_dev_only.purpose: Local development only. Not acceptable for shared, production, or externally writable systems.

rules: Do not create shared local accounts to bypass SSO or audit logging.
Use managed identities, service principals, GitHub Apps, workload identity, or equivalent scoped machine identities.
Keep credentials out of this file.
